name: Anomaly map generation
operation: Use an anomaly detector such as PatchCore or FastFlow to generate image-level anomaly score and pixel-level anomaly map.
purpose: Provide spatial localization cues for later VLM reasoning.

name: Candidate region extraction
operation: Threshold the anomaly map and extract connected components. Keep the top-k candidate regions according to anomaly response.
purpose: Convert dense anomaly localization into explicit visual regions.

name: Anomaly crop construction
operation: Crop local image regions around candidate boxes with padding and minimum crop-size constraints.
purpose: Remove irrelevant background and focus the VLM on suspicious local regions.

name: Prompt-based VLM reasoning
input: Full image or anomaly crops plus text prompts
operation: Compute image-text similarity between visual inputs and prompt sets.
purpose: Use VLM semantic ability for defect-type or normal/anomaly reasoning.

name: Top-k crop ensemble
operation: Aggregate candidate crop scores using max or top-k ensemble over anomaly margins.
purpose: Improve robustness when the top-1 candidate is not the best semantic crop.

name: Fallback rule
operation: If no candidate crop is available, use the full image as fallback.
output: Complete evaluation over all test images
purpose: Avoid selective evaluation and preserve fair full-test comparison.
